name: musinsa-rulebook
description: A self-growing team rulebook for Codex. Captures one engineer's hard-won lesson and enforces it on everyone's agent, scoring each change against the team's accumulated rules. Seeded with Musinsa's public engineering lessons.

interface.shortDescription: 팀이 함께 키우는 Codex 코딩 룰북 — 한 사람의 교훈을 모두의 에이전트에 강제
